message:
🐛 Fix transparent glass backgrounds across all themes (#1615)

All 28 themes used rgba with alpha < 1.0 for glassBackground,
causing every glass element (modals, cards, navbar, sidebar) to
show content bleeding through. Convert all glassBackground values
from rgba to rgb for fully opaque solid backgrounds.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
